## ADT

```{r adt-prep, include=FALSE}
n_adt   <- nrow(scMultiData[["ADT"]])
adt_features <- rownames(scMultiData[["ADT"]])

adt_counts_mat <- tryCatch(
  as.matrix(GetAssayData(scMultiData, assay = "ADT", layer = "counts")),
  error = function(e) NULL
)
mean_umi   <- if (is.matrix(adt_counts_mat)) round(mean(colSums(adt_counts_mat)), 1) else NA
median_umi <- if (is.matrix(adt_counts_mat)) round(median(colSums(adt_counts_mat)), 1) else NA

adt_qc <- data.frame(
  metric = c("ADT features", "Cells with ADT", "Mean UMIs / cell", "Median UMIs / cell"),
  value  = c(n_adt, ncol(scMultiData), mean_umi, median_umi)
)

cluster_col <- if ("seurat_clusters" %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data)) {
  "seurat_clusters"
} else if ("ident" %in% colnames(scMultiData@meta.data)) {
  "ident"
} else {
  NULL
}
```

**ADT QC**

```{r adt-qc, echo=FALSE}
knitr::kable(adt_qc, col.names = c("Metric", "Value"))
```

**ADT UMAP**

```{r adt-umap, echo=FALSE, fig.width=7, fig.height=7}
if ("adt.umap" %in% names(scMultiData@reductions)) {
  p <- DimPlot(scMultiData, reduction = "adt.umap",
               group.by = "Sample", raster = FALSE) +
    theme(aspect.ratio = 1) +
    ggtitle("ADT UMAP - by Sample")
  print(p)
  if (!is.null(cluster_col)) {
    p2 <- DimPlot(scMultiData, reduction = "adt.umap",
                  group.by = cluster_col, raster = FALSE,
                  label = TRUE, repel = TRUE) +
      theme(aspect.ratio = 1) +
      ggtitle("ADT UMAP - by RNA cluster")
    print(p2)
  }
}
```

**Per-cluster ADT means (DotPlot)**

```{r adt-dotplot, echo=FALSE, fig.width=10, fig.height=max(6, length(adt_features) * 0.18)}
if (!is.null(cluster_col)) {
  Idents(scMultiData) <- cluster_col
  DefaultAssay(scMultiData) <- "ADT"
  p <- DotPlot(scMultiData, features = unique(adt_features),
               assay = "ADT") +
    coord_flip() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  print(p)
  DefaultAssay(scMultiData) <- "RNA"
}
```

**Top markers by mean ADT signal**

```{r adt-feature-plots, echo=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
counts <- GetAssayData(scMultiData, assay = "ADT", layer = "data")
top_n <- min(8L, nrow(counts))
top_features <- names(sort(rowMeans(counts), decreasing = TRUE))[seq_len(top_n)]
DefaultAssay(scMultiData) <- "ADT"
p <- FeaturePlot(scMultiData, features = top_features,
                 reduction = "adt.umap", raster = FALSE,
                 ncol = 4) &
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1) &
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "D")
print(p)
DefaultAssay(scMultiData) <- "RNA"
```
